com.google.mu.cel.CelExpr

Package
Description
com.google.mu.cel
Cel Parser (requires mug-cel artifact)

  • Uses of CelExpr in com.google.mu.cel

    Subinterfaces of CelExpr in com.google.mu.cel
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    CelExpr.Binary
    An expression composed by a binary operator.
    static interface 
    CelExpr.Macro
    Abstract representation of a CEL macro expression.
    static interface 
    CelExpr.Unary
    An expression composed by a unary operator.

    Class
    Description

    CelExpr.Add

    Logical AND comparison: x && y.

    Byte sequence literal.

    Division: x / y.
    static final record

    Double-precision floating point literal.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.EqualTo
    Equality comparison: x == y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.FunctionCall
    Global function calls f(args).
    static final record 
    CelExpr.GreaterThan
    Greater than relational comparison: x > y.
    static final record

    Greater than or equal to relational comparison: x >= y.

    Methods in com.google.mu.cel that return types with arguments of type CelExpr
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<CelExpr>
    CelExpr.FunctionCall.args()
    Returns the value of the args record component.
    List<CelExpr>
    CelExpr.MemberCall.args()
    Returns the value of the args record component.
    List<CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr>>
    CelExpr.MapLiteral.entries()
    Returns the value of the entries record component.
    static CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr>
    CelExpr.Entry.of(CelExpr key, CelExpr value)
    Entry.of(string("key"), value(1)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("'key': 1").
    static CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr>
    CelExpr.Entry.optional(CelExpr key, CelExpr value)
    Entry.optional(string("key"), value(1)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("? 'key': 1").
    Methods in com.google.mu.cel with parameters of type CelExpr
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default CelExpr.Add
    CelExpr.add(CelExpr that)
    a.add(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a + b").
    default CelExpr.And
    CelExpr.and(CelExpr that)
    a.and(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a && b").
    default CelExpr.GreaterThanOrEqualTo
    CelExpr.atLeast(CelExpr floor)
    a.atLeast(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a >= b").
    default CelExpr.LessThanOrEqualTo
    CelExpr.atMost(CelExpr ceiling)
    a.atMost(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a <= b").
    default CelExpr.Divide
    CelExpr.divide(CelExpr that)
    a.divide(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a / b").
    default CelExpr.EqualTo
    CelExpr.equalTo(CelExpr that)
    a.equalTo(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a == b").
    default CelExpr.GreaterThan
    CelExpr.greaterThan(CelExpr that)
    a.greaterThan(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a > b").
    default CelExpr.Ternary
    CelExpr.ifElse(CelExpr ifTrue, CelExpr ifFalse)
    active.ifElse(1, 0) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("active ? 1 : 0").
    default CelExpr.In
    CelExpr.in(CelExpr that)
    a.in(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a in b").
    default CelExpr.Index
    CelExpr.index(CelExpr index)
    expr.index(value(0)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr[0]").
    default CelExpr.LessThan
    CelExpr.lessThan(CelExpr that)
    a.lessThan(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a < b").
    default CelExpr.Modulo
    CelExpr.modulo(CelExpr that)
    a.modulo(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a % b").
    default CelExpr.Multiply
    CelExpr.multiply(CelExpr that)
    a.multiply(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a * b").
    static CelExpr.Negative
    CelExpr.negative(CelExpr expr)
    CelExpr.negative(value(5)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("-(5)").
    static CelExpr.Not
    CelExpr.not(CelExpr expr)
    CelExpr.not(value(true)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("!true").
    default CelExpr.NotEqualTo
    CelExpr.notEqualTo(CelExpr that)
    a.notEqualTo(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a != b").
    static CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr>
    CelExpr.Entry.of(CelExpr key, CelExpr value)
    Entry.of(string("key"), value(1)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("'key': 1").
    static CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr.Ident>
    CelExpr.Entry.of(String key, CelExpr value)
    Entry.of("field", value(1)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("field: 1").
    static CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr>
    CelExpr.Entry.optional(CelExpr key, CelExpr value)
    Entry.optional(string("key"), value(1)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("? 'key': 1").
    static CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr.Ident>
    CelExpr.Entry.optional(String key, CelExpr value)
    Entry.optional("field", value(1)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("?field: 1").
    default CelExpr.OptionalIndex
    CelExpr.optionalIndex(CelExpr index)
    expr.optionalIndex(value(0)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr[?0]").
    default CelExpr.Or
    CelExpr.or(CelExpr that)
    a.or(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a || b").
    default CelExpr.Subtract
    CelExpr.subtract(CelExpr that)
    a.subtract(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a - b").
    Method parameters in com.google.mu.cel with type arguments of type CelExpr
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default CelExpr.MemberCall
    CelExpr.call(CelExpr.Ident member, List<CelExpr> args)
    target.call(member, args) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("target.member(args)").
